message:
feat(cli): add FrankenLab scenario CLI subcommand (bd-1hu19.4)

Add `asupersync lab` CLI with run/validate/replay/explore subcommands
for executing FrankenLab scenario YAML files from the command line.
Integrates serde_yaml for YAML parsing and wires into ScenarioRunner.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
